hypertension.key_factor: Very low sodium (9 mg/100 ml); zero sugar; no added sweeteners
hypertension.guidance: With only 9 mg sodium per 100 ml and zero sugar, this unsweetened packaged green tea is well within hypertension-safe limits and may be consumed freely as part of a low-sodium dietary pattern; individuals should verify the product label confirms no sodium-containing additives.

type2_diabetes.key_factor: Zero carbohydrates and zero sugar; no glycemic load; green tea catechins may modestly improve insulin sensitivity
type2_diabetes.guidance: This unsweetened packaged green tea contains 0 g carbohydrate and 0 g sugar per 100 ml, producing no glycemic response, making it a suitable beverage choice for individuals managing Type 2 Diabetes; consumers should confirm the product label shows no added sugars or sweeteners.

cardiovascular_disease.key_factor: Zero fat, zero saturated fat, very low sodium; green tea polyphenols (EGCG, catechins) associated with vascular health benefits
cardiovascular_disease.guidance: Unsweetened packaged green tea contains no fat, no saturated fat, and negligible sodium, and the polyphenolic compounds in green tea (particularly EGCG) have been associated in epidemiological studies with modest reductions in LDL cholesterol and improved endothelial function, supporting its inclusion in a heart-healthy diet.

rheumatoid_arthritis.key_factor: EGCG and catechins with documented anti-inflammatory properties; zero fat and zero sugar
rheumatoid_arthritis.guidance: Green tea catechins, particularly EGCG, have demonstrated anti-inflammatory properties in peer-reviewed research relevant to rheumatoid arthritis; this unsweetened packaged product contains no pro-inflammatory fats or sugars and is suitable for individuals with RA, subject to confirming no artificial additives on the product label.

llm_training.natural_language_description: Green Tea (No Sugar, Packaged) is a ready-to-drink (RTD) unsweetened green tea beverage sold in sealed bottles or cartons, widely available in Singapore supermarkets, convenience stores, and vending machines. It is produced by brewing green tea leaves or dissolving green tea extract in water, with no sugar, sweeteners, or flavourings added. The beverage is clear to pale golden-green in colour with a mild, slightly astringent, grassy flavour characteristic of green tea. Per 100 ml, it contains 0 kcal energy, 0 g protein, 0 g fat, 0 g carbohydrate, 0 g sugar, and 9 mg sodium, making it one of the lowest-calorie commercial beverages available. The absence of sugar and carbohydrates means it produces no glycemic response, making it suitable for individuals managing Type 2 Diabetes, hypertension, and cardiovascular disease. Green tea is naturally rich in polyphenolic antioxidants, particularly epigallocatechin gallate (EGCG) and other catechins, which have been associated in clinical and epidemiological research with modest improvements in insulin sensitivity, LDL cholesterol reduction, and anti-inflammatory effects relevant to conditions such as rheumatoid arthritis. This product is vegan, halal, gluten-free, and dairy-free. It is commonly consumed at breakfast, as a midday refreshment, or as a low-calorie alternative to sugary drinks. In Singapore, it is a staple RTD beverage across all ethnic communities.

confidence_reason: Nutrient values sourced directly from the HPB Singapore Foodo database, which is the primary approved source for Singapore food products. All core macros are confirmed as 0 g/100 ml by HPB, consistent with the product category (unsweetened RTD tea). Sodium value of 9 mg/100 ml is explicitly reported by HPB. Confidence is high as this is an exact match in an approved primary source.
notes: Zero-macro justification: protein_g is naturally zero as this is a water-based unsweetened tea beverage containing no protein-bearing ingredients. fat_g is naturally zero by product formulation — unsweetened RTD green tea contains no fat-bearing ingredients. carbohydrate_g is confirmed zero per HPB Singapore Foodo database; no sugars or carbohydrate sources are added to this product. energy_kcal is consequently 0 kcal. Glycemic index is not applicable as this food contains negligible carbohydrates (0 g/100 ml); gi_category set to not_applicable; glycemic_index set to numeric 0 as a sentinel value for a zero-carbohydrate beverage where GI measurement is not applicable. Negative sentinel values: monounsaturated_fat_g, polyunsaturated_fat_g, potassium_mg, vitamin_c_mg, vitamin_a_mcg_rae, vitamin_b1_thiamine_mg, vitamin_b2_riboflavin_mg, vitamin_b3_niacin_mg, vitamin_b6_mg, vitamin_b12_mcg, folate_mcg_dfe, vitamin_d_mcg, vitamin_e_mg, phosphorus_mg, magnesium_mg, zinc_mg, selenium_mcg, water_g set to -1: detailed micronutrient and fatty acid breakdown for this packaged RTD green tea product is not reported in the HPB Singapore Foodo database entry as of 2026-04-16. Consumers should verify the specific product label for any additives or preservatives. The dietary_tags keto and low_calorie from the input record are preserved as they are consistent with the nutritional profile.
